title: EvalRunSkill
description: Schema for the eval_run skill (CCW-MVP11). Runs golden tests and returns pass/fail/regression counts.

golden_dir.description: Path to directory containing golden test JSON fixtures. Default: .claude/eval/golden

output_dir.description: Path to directory for writing timestamped result files. Default: .claude/eval/results

skills_dir.description: Path to directory containing skill .py implementations. Default: .claude/tools/skills

compare_previous.description: Whether to compare against the most recent previous run for regression detection. Default: true

tests_run.description: Total number of golden tests executed.

fail_count.description: Number of tests that failed (field mismatch).

error_count.description: Number of tests that errored (skill load/runtime failure).

regression_count.description: Number of tests that regressed versus the previous run.

results_file.description: Absolute path to the saved run result JSON file.
